scripts.start: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const creds = JSON.stringify({'1c8b5a3527113f23':{user:process.env.MQTT_USER||'',password:process.env.MQTT_PASS||''},'ed9ec732d5bf02d5':{userid:process.env.EMAIL_USER||'',password:process.env.EMAIL_PASS||''}}); fs.writeFileSync('flows_cred.json', creds); try { fs.mkdirSync('/opt/render/.node-red', {recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync('/opt/render/.node-red/flows_cred.json', creds); } catch(e){}" && node-red -s settings.js flows.json
